title: Pagination, Filtering, Links, Rate Limits, Versioning, and Resumable Work · Browser and Node C… · Compiler Case: Links Versioning Discovery
summary: An infinite-scroll accessibility view traverses cursor links, rate limits, filter encodings, resumable state, and focus restoration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http ts links versioning discovery increment in a TypeScript 7 standards-based Fetch resumable rate-aware API traversal. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Follow documented links and version boundaries while preventing untrusted relation targets from expanding authority. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.

Coordinate server guidance, local quotas, concurrency, backoff, and caller priorities without synchronized bursts. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
